---
title: "Exploring Storms"
author: "Astri Cahyani"
execute:
  echo: false
---

```{r setup}
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(tidyverse))
```

This analysis explores the historical `storms` dataset from the **dplyr** package, tracking storm activity from 1975 to 2024.

## Annual Storm Counts

Below is a visualization of the total number of unique named storms recorded each year.

```{r plot-storms}
storms %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarize(n_storms = n_distinct(name), .groups = "drop") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = year, y = n_storms)) +
  geom_line(color = "dodgerblue", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(color = "dodgerblue4", size = 2) +
  labs(
    title = "Number of Named Storms per Year",
    subtitle = "Data from 1975 to 2024",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Number of Named Storms"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    plot.title.position = "plot"
  )
```
